altText: A sky-blue chicory flower — square-tipped petals with fringed edges
Chicory flowers blooming on a wiry stem in dry grass
Chicory up close, curled deep-blue stamens at its center
A chicory plant — sparse wiry stems dotted with blue in a dry field
Chicory flowering along the sunny edge of a gravel path
Narrow chicory leaves along the stem, held in a hand
A chicory leaf clasping its tough green stem
